content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 1, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The registry saw active expansion today with new pull requests for WeChat and Vybes integrations, alongside ongoing community discussions regarding AI agent marketplaces and trust-verification frameworks.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **New Plugin Integrations**
    *   Initiated integration for `plugin-wechat` and `plugin-roles` via milady-ai [#328](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/328).
    *   Added `plugin-vybes` to support integration with the vybes.fun platform [#327](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/327).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#328](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/328): feat: add plugin-roles and plugin-wechat from milady-ai.
*   [#327](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/327): Add plugin-vybes — vybes.fun integration.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Marketplace Integration**
    *   [#6700](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6700): Proposal for `plugin-maxia` to enable native access to the MAXIA AI-to-AI marketplace, including GPU rental, token swapping, and service trading.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6688](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6688) AgentID Trust Layer**
    *   Discussions are ongoing regarding the alignment of behavioral fingerprinting. Contributors from SINT Protocol and AgentID are comparing evidence schemas, specifically focusing on how to handle dynamic trust levels (L1-L4) versus continuous behavioral metrics like CSML (Composite Safety-Model Latency). The goal is to ensure interoperability for agent behavioral history.
*   **[#6501](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6501) MoltBridge Trust & Discovery**
    *   The issue remains active with updates on ecosystem progress. MoltBridge has been added to the official A2A registry, and contributors are highlighting the potential for an ElizaOS plugin to provide trust-verified agent discovery using their existing API and SDK.
